title: Kegel Trainer: Performance-Focused Flutter Wellness App
description: A ~7,900-line Flutter app across 7 screens with zero bundled image assets, where all art renders as inline SVG tinted from the active theme. Holds frame rate stable on low-end phones and ships a bring-your-own-key AI coach over nine LLM providers, with user keys sent directly to the provider and never stored off-device.
